summary: Completed comprehensive testing of C&C Property Care static site restructuring. All files successfully moved to root folder, old css/ and js/ subfolders removed, references updated, and site functionality verified on desktop and mobile viewports.
passed_tests: ✅ File structure: index.html, styles.css, and main.js are in root folder
✅ Old css/ and js/ subfolders successfully removed
✅ index.html references updated to root-level files (styles.css, main.js)
✅ Static site serves correctly (200 OK for all resources)
✅ styles.css loads and applies correctly (gradient backgrounds detected)
✅ Hero section renders with correct H1 and content
✅ Services section with 5 expandable dropdowns works
✅ Footer displays with correct content and contact info
✅ Mobile CTA bar visible on mobile viewport
✅ Header book button hidden on mobile (correct responsive behavior)
✅ README.md updated to reflect root-level structure
